description_long: This is a square, plush cushion with a slightly irregular, soft form, suggesting it is filled with a compressible material. The exterior fabric is patterned with bold, black vertical and horizontal bars on a white or light beige background, creating a modern, geometric grid design. The cushion's surface appears smooth and slightly shiny, indicating a synthetic or cotton-blend fabric. The edges are subtly rounded and the seams are visible, giving it a casual, relaxed appearance. The cushion is thick and puffy, likely providing comfortable support when used. There are no visible tags, zippers, or brand markings on the surface.
description: A square, puffy cushion with a black grid pattern on a white background and a soft, smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full grid pattern with a slightly bulging, plush form and visible seam at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cushion's thickness and the way the pattern wraps around the edge, emphasizing its puffiness.
description_view_2: Back view is nearly identical to the front, displaying the same grid pattern and soft, rounded shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the cushion's depth and the continuation of the grid pattern along the seam.
attribute_placement: placed on a lounge chair or outdoor bench as a backrest or seat cushion
